events.name: solar_flare
events.description: Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.

events.name: dust_storm
events.description: A massive dust storm engulfs the colony for weeks.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))

meta_awareness.insight: Coral Mist wonders why the colony history feels like it follows a script.

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.
A rich vein of iron oxide uncovered during excavation.
Severe radiation event — all colonists confined to shielded core.
The worst dust storm in decades buries the southern airlock.
The primary water recycler fails catastrophically.
Ice geyser breaks through permafrost near the colony perimeter.
Strange crystalline structures found in deep drill core.
Ice deposits discovered beneath the eastern ridge.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Lava tube entrance found — potential expansion space.
Accusations of resource hoarding fracture the colony trust.
Coding breakthrough: automated drone maintenance saves labor.
Double shadow: Phobos and Deimos transit simultaneously.
Fine Martian regolith clogs air filters and reduces solar output.
Unknown pathogen spreads through the water system.
Lava tube entrance found — potential expansion space.
A massive dust storm engulfs the colony for weeks.
Accusations of resource hoarding fracture the colony trust.
Electronics damaged by electromagnetic pulse from solar event.
Greenhouse dome seal breach — crops exposed to vacuum.
Video letters from family arrive after 22-minute delay.
New hydroponics technique doubles crop yield per unit water.
Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.

messages.content: Supply ship ship-6 lost in transit.
Supply ship ship-7 arrived with cargo: {'spare_parts': 0.533, 'medical_supplies': 0.309, 'scientific_equipment': 0.218}
Earth reaffirms commitment to Mars program.
